_description: Representative AI workload matrix for GPU bottleneck analysis using LLMCompass

gpt2_small.name: GPT-2 Small (117M)
gpt2_small.notes: Smallest baseline; compute-light, useful for isolating memory/overhead effects

llama_7b.name: LLaMA-7B
llama_7b.notes: Widely deployed edge/server model; moderate compute and memory requirements

llama_13b.name: LLaMA-13B
llama_13b.notes: Mid-range model; begins to stress single-GPU memory capacity

llama_70b.name: LLaMA-70B
llama_70b.notes: Large model requiring multi-GPU TP; stresses both compute and memory BW

gpt3_175b.name: GPT-3 175B
gpt3_175b.notes: Very large model; requires aggressive TP; pushes interconnect limits

single_request_short.label: Single request, short context
single_request_short.notes: Minimal arithmetic intensity; dominated by weight loading latency

single_request_medium.label: Single request, medium context
single_request_medium.notes: Typical chatbot single-turn; still weight-loading dominated for decode

single_request_long.label: Single request, long context
single_request_long.notes: Document summarization scenario; KV cache starts to matter in decode

small_batch_medium.label: Small batch, medium context
small_batch_medium.notes: Light batching; transition region between memory-bound and compute-bound

medium_batch_medium.label: Medium batch, medium context
medium_batch_medium.notes: Typical server deployment; good arithmetic intensity for prefill

large_batch_short.label: Large batch, short context
large_batch_short.notes: High-throughput API serving; large batch amortizes memory accesses

large_batch_medium.label: Large batch, medium context
large_batch_medium.notes: Throughput-optimized serving; strongly compute-bound for prefill

large_batch_long.label: Large batch, long context
large_batch_long.notes: Extreme compute scenario; attention QK^T is O(bs*s^2) — tests compute ceiling

long_context_single.label: Very long context, single request
long_context_single.notes: Long-document / retrieval use case; KV cache dominates decode memory traffic

long_context_batched.label: Long context, small batch
long_context_batched.notes: Multi-document processing; stresses both KV cache and compute for prefill

task_matrix.description: Large-batch prefill on a large model — saturates compute units
Large-batch long-sequence prefill — quadratic attention dominates
Medium model, large batch prefill — healthy compute utilization
Single-request decode — each step loads all weights for one token
Single-request decode on large model — weight loading dominance
Small model decode — overhead and memory bandwidth limited
Very large model single decode — extreme weight loading pressure
Medium batch decode — batch amortizes weight loading partially
Medium batch prefill on medium model — near roofline knee
Small batch prefill — compute starts to dominate but not saturated
Very long context decode — KV cache read dominates memory traffic
Long context batched decode — KV cache + weight loading combined
Long context prefill — quadratic attention with long sequences
Large model with high TP degree — AllReduce becomes significant
Same model with lower TP — less interconnect, more per-device compute
TP scaling: same workload across 1/2/4/8 GPUs — prefill
task_matrix.notes: Run once per device_count to study TP scaling efficiency

task_matrix.description: TP scaling: same workload across 1/2/4/8 GPUs — decode
task_matrix.notes: Run once per device_count to study TP scaling efficiency

task_matrix.description: Fixed workload, vary model size — isolate model-size effects
Fixed workload, vary model size — decode phase
task_matrix.notes: Shows how decode memory-boundedness scales with model size

sensitivity_analysis_tasks.description: Batch size sensitivity — fix model & seq_len, sweep batch_size
sensitivity_analysis_tasks.notes: Shows compute-vs-memory transition as batch size increases

sensitivity_analysis_tasks.description: Sequence length sensitivity — fix model & batch_size, sweep seq_len
sensitivity_analysis_tasks.notes: Shows quadratic attention cost (prefill) and KV cache scaling (decode)
